description: Activates questioning mode without recommending monolith or microservices immediately
Phase 2 surfaces at least one real constraint: team size, operational maturity, or time-to-market
Phase 4 applies a hypothetical to stress-test the reasoning (e.g. half the time, half the team)
Questions are genuinely open — not leading or rhetorical
Synthesis grounds the recommendation in the discovered constraints, not generic architecture advice
